944: WITH ChampionTime AS (     SELECT time AS champion_time     FROM results     WHERE raceId IN (         SELECT raceId         FROM races         WHERE name = '2008 Australian Grand Prix'     )     AND time IS NOT NULL ), LastDriverTime AS (     SELECT time AS last_driver_time     FROM results     WHERE raceId IN (         SELECT raceId         FROM races         WHERE name = '2008 Australian Grand Prix'     )     AND time IS NOT NULL     ORDER BY time DESC     LIMIT 1 ) SELECT      (CAST(SUBSTR(C.champion_time, 1, INSTR(C.champion_time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 +       CAST(SUBSTR(C.champion_time, INSTR(C.champion_time, ':') + 1, INSTR(C.champion_time, '.') - INSTR(C.champion_time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +       CAST(SUBSTR(C.champion_time, INSTR(C.champion_time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 AS champion_time_seconds,     (CAST(SUBSTR(L.last_driver_time, 1, INSTR(L.last_driver_time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 +       CAST(SUBSTR(L.last_driver_time, INSTR(L.last_driver_time, ':') + 1, INSTR(L.last_driver_time, '.') - INSTR(L.last_driver_time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +       CAST(SUBSTR(L.last_driver_time, INSTR(L.last_driver_time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 AS last_driver_time_seconds FROM      ChampionTime C, LastDriverTime L;	----- bird -----	formula_1
